name: docs-hub
description: Provider-agnostic project docs: a per-repo Docs Root at .docs/vault (self-ignoring, always a symlink to a durable Backing Store) that consumer plugins read AND write with plain file tools; a unified `## docs configuration` block ({project, provider, store}) in CLAUDE.local.md; the filesystem provider (~/.docs/<project>) built in; and a single front-door setup that migrates legacy `## spec configuration` blocks and delegates driver work to provider plugins like docs-obsidian
